channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Voter discontent propels Republican Spencer Pratt into close race with L.A. Mayor Bass
item.description: Republican Spencer Pratt aims to leverage political change to force a runoff with Democratic Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass.

item.title: Ken Paxton expresses optimism about Senate GOP support after primary win
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton, after defeating incumbent Sen. John Cornyn in the GOP primary runoff, said he believes...

item.title: A Year of Deregulation Ignited an American Nuclear Renaissance
item.description: Trump’s May 2025 executive orders have led to a productive year for nuclear power.

item.title: Not Your Father’s Ferrari . . . but Whose Is It?
item.description: Electric vehicles have their place, but probably not in my garage.
